basic_details.job_title: SVSU Recruitment 2026: Skill Professor & Associate Professor - Apply by 03 July 2026
basic_details.short_information: Shri Vishwakarma Skill University (SVSU), Palwal, Haryana is inviting offline applications from eligible faculty members for appointment on deputation as Skill Professor and Skill Associate Professor across multiple disciplines. A total of 9 Skill Professor and 10 Skill Associate Professor vacancies (1 post each per discipline) are on offer. Applications must reach the university on or before 03 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Candidates currently serving in government organisations, PSUs, autonomous bodies, or state/central universities in analogous posts are eligible to apply.

qualification.details: Eligibility varies by discipline and post. Candidates must verify the full conditions in Annexure-A and B of the official notification. The core requirements by category are summarised below. | Computer Science & Engineering / IT and Management: Ph.D. in the relevant field, First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level, a minimum of 10 years' experience in teaching/research/industry (at least 3 years at Associate Professor level), and at least 6 research publications in SCI/UGC/AICTE-listed journals plus 2 successful Ph.D. supervised; OR at least 10 research publications at Associate Professor level. | Nursing: M.Sc. Nursing with 12 years' total experience, including 10 years' teaching experience after M.Sc. Ph.D. (Nursing) is desirable. | Pharmacy: B.Pharm., registration under the Pharmacy Act 1948, Ph.D. with First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level, 10 years' experience at Lecturer level, and a research score of 120 as per Annexure-B. Industry professionals with First Class Master's and significant professional work equivalent to Ph.D. may also apply under the alternate criteria. | Physiotherapy: Master's degree in Physiotherapy (M.P.T./M.Th.P./M.Sc. P.T.) with 10 years' total experience. Ph.D. in Physiotherapy is desirable. | Visual Arts and Fine Arts: Doctoral degree, at least 10 years' teaching/research experience, minimum 6 research publications in peer-reviewed or UGC-listed journals, and a research score of 120. | Performing Arts: Either (A) doctoral degree with 10 years' experience, 6 publications, and research score of 120; OR (B) a traditional/professional artist with Master's degree, 'A'-grade artist status from AIR/Doordarshan, 10 years of outstanding performing achievements, and significant research-guiding contributions. | Tourism: Ph.D. in the relevant discipline, minimum 10 research publications, research score of 120, and 10 years' teaching/research experience with evidence of guided doctoral candidates; OR an outstanding professional with Ph.D. and 10 years of demonstrated contribution. | Agriculture and Tourism: Ph.D., Master's with at least 55% marks, minimum 8 years' teaching/research experience at Assistant Professor level, 7 publications in peer-reviewed/UGC/NAAS-rated journals, and a research score of 75. | Computer Science & Engineering / IT and Management: Ph.D., First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level, 6 research publications in SCI/UGC/AICTE-listed journals, and 8 years' experience including at least 2 years Post-Ph.D. | Nursing: M.Sc. Nursing with 8 years' total experience including 5 years' teaching experience. Ph.D. (Nursing) is desirable. | Pharmacy: B.Pharm., registration under Pharmacy Act 1948, Ph.D. with First Class, 8 years' experience at Lecturer level (excluding period spent on research degree), and a research score of 75. Alternate criteria apply for industry professionals. | Physiotherapy: Master's degree in Physiotherapy with 8 years' experience as an Assistant Professor. | Fine Arts, Visual Arts, and Performing Arts: Doctoral degree, high professional performance standard, 8 years' teaching/research experience, and significant contributions evidenced by quality publications. | Candidates already working in a service are required to apply through proper channel with a vigilance clearance certificate. An advance copy may be sent directly, but the candidate must produce a No Objection Certificate and Vigilance Clearance Certificate in a sealed cover from the employer at the time of interview.

selection_process: Research Performance (assessed by subject experts on best publications) 40
Domain Knowledge & Teaching Skills (assessed through presentation) 20
The selection will be based on a composite score out of 100 marks

All eligible applicants will be called for interview. A candidate must secure a minimum composite score of 60% to be considered suitable for selection. Candidates belonging to SC/BC/PwBD categories need to secure at least 57%. In cases of a tie
preference will be given first to the older candidate
and then to the candidate who acquired the essential degree earlier.
how_to_apply: Download the application form from the official notification (Annexure provided in the advertisement).
Fill in all sections completely in block letters or as required.
Attach self-attested copies of all certificates and testimonials; all documents must be indexed and page-numbered.

Serving candidates must route the application through proper channel along with APARs/SARs/ACRs for the preceding five years and Vigilance Clearance Certificate (as per Annexure-D and E of the notification).
Write on the envelope: "Applicant applied for the post of ___ (Name of post) with (Subject/discipline) and ___ Post Code."

Send the complete application package by post or in person to: Assistant Registrar, Establishment Branch, Admin Block, 2nd Floor, Shri Vishwakarma Skill University, Dudhola, Palwal so that it is received on or before 03 July 2026 by 5:00 PM.
Applications received by email or after the deadline - for any reason including postal delay - will not be accepted.

content_sections.heading: SVSU Recruitment 2026 - Quick Summary
content_sections.text: SVSU is Haryana's first government skill university, established under the Government of Haryana Act 25, 2016, with its permanent campus at Dudhola, District Palwal. This recruitment is strictly on deputation basis , initially for one year, extendable up to three years with mutual consent.

rows.details: Shri Vishwakarma Skill University (SVSU), Dudhola, Palwal, Haryana

content_sections.heading: SVSU Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: The notification was issued on 11 June 2026 . Applications received after 03 July 2026 at 5:00 PM , including those delayed due to postal reasons, will not be considered. Candidates must ensure their complete application packet - with all self-attested supporting documents - reaches the university address by the deadline.

content_sections.heading: SVSU Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Breakdown
content_sections.text: Each discipline carries 1 post . The total vacancy count stands at 18 posts across both categories. Candidates should note the post code of their discipline, as it must be mentioned on the application envelope

content_sections.heading: SVSU Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility
content_sections.text: Eligibility varies by discipline and post. Candidates must verify the full conditions in Annexure-A and B of the official notification. The core requirements by category are summarised below. Computer Science & Engineering / IT and Management: Ph.D. in the relevant field, First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level, a minimum of 10 years' experience in teaching/research/industry (at least 3 years at Associate Professor level), and at least 6 research publications in SCI/UGC/AICTE-listed journals plus 2 successful Ph.D. supervised ; OR at least 10 research publications at Associate Professor level. Nursing: M.Sc. Nursing with 12 years' total experience , including 10 years' teaching experience after M.Sc. Ph.D. (Nursing) is desirable. Pharmacy: B.Pharm., registration under the Pharmacy Act 1948, Ph.D. with First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level, 10 years' experience at Lecturer level, and a research score of 120 as per Annexure-B. Industry professionals with First Class Master's and significant professional work equivalent to Ph.D. may also apply under the alternate criteria. Physiotherapy: Master's degree in Physiotherapy (M.P.T./M.Th.P./M.Sc. P.T.) with 10 years' total experience . Ph.D. in Physiotherapy is desirable. Visual Arts and Fine Arts: Doctoral degree, at least 10 years' teaching/research experience , minimum 6 research publications in peer-reviewed or UGC-listed journals, and a research score of 120 . Performing Arts: Either (A) doctoral degree with 10 years' experience, 6 publications, and research score of 120; OR (B) a traditional/professional artist with Master's degree, 'A'-grade artist status from AIR/Doordarshan, 10 years of outstanding performing achievements, and significant research-guiding contributions. Tourism: Ph.D. in the relevant discipline, minimum 10 research publications , research score of 120 , and 10 years' teaching/research experience with evidence of guided doctoral candidates; OR an outstanding professional with Ph.D. and 10 years of demonstrated contribution. Agriculture and Tourism: Ph.D., Master's with at least 55% marks , minimum 8 years' teaching/research experience at Assistant Professor level, 7 publications in peer-reviewed/UGC/NAAS-rated journals, and a research score of 75 . Computer Science & Engineering / IT and Management: Ph.D., First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level, 6 research publications in SCI/UGC/AICTE-listed journals, and 8 years' experience including at least 2 years Post-Ph.D. Nursing: M.Sc. Nursing with 8 years' total experience including 5 years' teaching experience . Ph.D. (Nursing) is desirable. Pharmacy: B.Pharm., registration under Pharmacy Act 1948, Ph.D. with First Class, 8 years' experience at Lecturer level (excluding period spent on research degree), and a research score of 75 . Alternate criteria apply for industry professionals. Physiotherapy: Master's degree in Physiotherapy with 8 years' experience as an Assistant Professor . Fine Arts, Visual Arts, and Performing

content_sections.heading: SVSU Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection will be based on a composite score out of 100 marks , structured as follows: All eligible applicants will be called for interview. A candidate must secure a minimum composite score of 60% to be considered suitable for selection. Candidates belonging to SC/BC/PwBD categories need to secure at least 57% . In cases of a tie, preference will be given first to the older candidate, and then to the candidate who acquired the essential degree earlier.

rows.component: Research Performance (assessed by subject experts on best publications)
Domain Knowledge & Teaching Skills (assessed through presentation)

content_sections.heading: SVSU Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications received by email or after the deadline - for any reason including postal delay - will not be accepted.

content_sections.heading: SVSU Recruitment 2026 - Deputation Terms
content_sections.text: The deputation period will be initially for one year , extendable on a year-to-year basis up to a maximum of three years with mutual consent. The university, however, reserves the right to repatriate a deputed employee at any stage without assigning any reason. Terms and conditions will be governed by the rules of the parent university or Haryana Government, as applicable. No TA/DA is payable for attending the interview.

content_sections.heading: SVSU Recruitment 2026 - Troubleshooting & Common Mistakes
content_sections.text: Document completeness: Applications not accompanied by the required self-attested copies of certificates and testimonials will be summarily rejected. Ensure every document is self-attested, indexed, and page-numbered before submission. Envelope labelling: Always mention the post name, subject/discipline, and post code on the outer envelope exactly as instructed. Missing this detail can cause processing delays. Proper channel requirement: Candidates in active service must route their application through their employer. If the forwarded application is delayed for any reason, carry the NOC and Vigilance Clearance Certificate in a sealed envelope to the interview - failure to do so will result in disqualification. Advance copy: Sending an advance copy of your application directly to SVSU is permitted and recommended, but it does not substitute for the formally forwarded application. Last-day submission: Avoid submitting close to the deadline. Postal delays are not accepted as a valid reason for late receipt. If couriering, confirm the delivery date with your courier service in advance. APAR/ACR submissions: Ensure your employer attaches APARs/SARs/ACRs for all five preceding years. Missing even one year's report can invalidate your application at the screening stage. Email submissions not valid: The university explicitly states that applications received through email will not be considered. Only physical applications sent to the specified address are accepted.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SVSU Deputation Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The completed application must reach Shri Vishwakarma Skill University, Dudhola, Palwal by 03 July 2026 at 5:00 PM. Applications received after this time, including those delayed in transit, will not be entertained.

faq.question: Q2. Who can apply for these deputation posts?
faq.answer: Candidates working on analogous posts - Professor (APL-14) or Associate Professor (APL-13A under 7th CPC) - in Government Organisations, Government Institutes, PSUs, Autonomous Bodies, or State/Central Universities are eligible. Assistant Professors and Associate Professors meeting the full eligibility criteria may also apply for the Skill Professor and Skill Associate Professor posts respectively.

faq.question: Q3. How many posts are available in SVSU Deputation Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 18 posts are available - 9 Skill Professor posts and 10 Skill Associate Professor posts, with 1 post per discipline in each category.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted in offline mode only. Applications submitted via email will not be considered.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for SVSU Skill Professor and Skill Associate Professor?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a composite score of 100 marks covering academic performance (20), research performance (40), domain knowledge and teaching skills assessed through presentation (20), and interview performance (20).

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum score required to be selected?
faq.answer: Candidates must secure a minimum composite score of 60% (57% for SC/BC/PwBD) during the interview and assessment process to be considered suitable.

faq.question: Q7. For how long is the deputation initially granted?
faq.answer: The deputation is granted for an initial period of one year, which may be extended year to year up to a maximum of three years with mutual consent.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for SVSU Deputation Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The completed application must reach Shri Vishwakarma Skill University, Dudhola, Palwal by 03 July 2026 at 5:00 PM. Applications received after this time, including those delayed in transit, will not be entertained.

Assistant Professors and Associate Professors meeting the full eligibility criteria may also apply for the Skill Professor and Skill Associate Professor posts respectively.
